runners.formComment: Placed last time (23.08) at Dubbo in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten one length. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Key chance and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (23.08) at Dubbo in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten one length. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Key chance and should go close.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 4 over 340m at Gunnedah behind Train Of Thought beaten 2.5 lengths (20.16) in a Grade 5. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels rounding the turn into the home straight.

runners.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by a neck over 330m at this track in a handy 18.94, beating Jacobite Knife. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

runners.formComment: Disappointed last time but just missed the placings two back over 330m at this track. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.16) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 3 lengths. Has a win and two places from three starts from this draw. Others rate better this time.

runners.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 2.25 lengths second at this track but did record a slick 18.92 over the 330m journey. Among the each way chances if runs up to latest.

runners.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fourth (20.30) at Gunnedah over 340m. Has claims if at his best.

runners.formComment: Last start finished fifth on April 8 over 330m at this track behind Slick Silas, beaten 3.5 lengths (19.17) in a Grade 5. Likely to find this a bit tough.

runners.formComment: Resumes from a four-and-a-half months spell and was a winner at only other fresh up run, scoring in 22.15 over 400m at Maitland. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 330m at this track. Prefer to watch at this stage.
